description:
DJ library organizer that sorts tracks by mood, energy, and technique.

Vibes is a DJ library organizer that helps DJs sort and prepare tracks by mood,
energy, and technique. Native Windows app with a focused, dark UI and auto-updates.
Alternative to Rekordbox, Serato, Engine DJ, and Lexicon DJ for library preparation.
Vibes v0.11.12
Changes
- many new
Downloads
macOS (Apple Silicon — M1/M2/M3/M4)
- Download Vibes_0.11.12_aarch64.dmg
- Intel Macs are not supported.
Windows (64-bit)
- Download Vibes_0.11.12_x64-setup.exe
- Supports Windows 10 and later.
Auto-Update
Existing users receive this update automatically.
Platforms
- macOS (ARM64)
- Windows (x64)
